CustomField.description: The numeric value used with the Time Frame field to define the rollup window. Represents years or days depending on the Time Frame selection.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the number of years or days for the rollup time window. For example, enter 5 with "Years Ago" to roll up the last 5 years, or 365 with "Days Back" to roll up the last year.
CustomField.label: Integer
